Since 2016, FLASH has also run free water tanker services for areas facing summer shortages, and provided water and nutrition for 265 plants across Eluru city.

About Us

ఫ్లాష్ టీమ్ గురించి

FLASH Team is a registered charitable society based in Eluru, Andhra Pradesh. What began as a small group of volunteers has grown into a trusted community service organization known for its rapid ambulance response and grassroots health outreach.

We work directly with families in Eluru and nearby mandals — because in an emergency, the nearest help is often the only help that matters.

Forum for Legal, Ambulance,
Social & Health Services
  • 📍 Based in Eluru, Andhra Pradesh
  • 🏛️ Registered Charitable Society
  • 🚑 Free Ambulance Services
  • 🩺 Community Health Camps
  • 🤝 5 Ongoing Programs
What We Do

Emergency Ambulance Response

Rapid, free ambulance service dispatched across Eluru and neighboring areas.
